- [ ] Photography

## Subject

---

## Findings

<!-- Share your findings here. Markdown tables are fine for measurements.
     Attach images directly to this issue. For large files (raw scan data,
     IQ capture files, etc.), link to an external host. -->

---

## Equipment and conditions

<!-- What tools did you use? (caliper model, SDR hardware, camera, etc.)
